name: Crypto Bar
description:
A powerful, minimalist GNOME Shell extension to track live cryptocurrency prices and 24h profit/loss.

Sources: Binance, Nobitex, OKX, Crypto.com, CoinGecko.
Features: Static and Ticker panel modes.

Project: https://github.com/abbasnaqdi/crypto-bar
(A heavily modernized fork of Crypto Price Tracker)
